zh.lifeSummary: 當William Clapp於1500年出生在英國英格蘭戴文希德波利時，他的父親Thomas Clapp40歲，母親Mrs. Thomas Clapp39歲。他於1526年與Alice在英國英格蘭戴文希德波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年5月20日在英國英格蘭戴文享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文希德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Clapp于1500年出生在英国英格兰戴文希德波利时，他的父亲Thomas Clapp40岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas Clapp39岁。他于1526年与Alice在英国英格兰戴文希德波利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年5月20日在英国英格兰戴文享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文希德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Clapp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Somerset): either from Middle English clop(pe), clap(pe) ‘lump’, perhaps denoting a stocky person, or Middle English clap(pe) ‘loud noise; noisy, idle chatter’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of Slovenian Klep: nickname from klep ‘sharpness of scythe or sickle’, also ‘sharpening with a hammer’.

variants.name: Klapp
meanings: German: nickname for a gossip or slanderer, from Middle High German klapf, klaff ‘prattle, malicious gossip’. Compare Clapp .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Clapp was born in 1500, in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Clapp, was 40 and his mother, Mrs. Thomas Clapp, was 39. He married Alice in 1526, in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 20 May 1555, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Clapp est né en 1500, à Sidbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Clapp, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas Clapp, avait 39 ans. Il a épousé Alice en 1526, à Sidbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1555, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Sidbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Clapp 1500 in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Clapp 40 und seine Mutter Mrs. Thomas Clapp 39. Er hat 1526 in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom Alice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1555 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sidbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Clapp è nato il nel 1500 nel Sidbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Clapp, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Thomas Clapp, aveva 39 anni. Lui sposato Alice nel 1526, nel Sidbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 20 maggio 1555, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Sidbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Clappが1500年にイギリスイギリスデボンシドブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Clappは40歳，母Mrs. Thomas Clappは39歳であった。1526年にイギリスイギリスデボンシドブリーでAliceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年5月20日にイギリスイギリスデボンで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンシドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Clapp(이)가 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clapp(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas Clapp(은)는 39세였다. 그는 1526년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시드버이에서 Alice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 5월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 시드버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Clapp nasceu em 1500, em Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Clapp, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thomas Clapp, tinha 39 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice em 1526, em Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1555, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Clapp родился в 1500 г. в местности сидбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Clapp было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas Clapp, 39. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice в 1526 г. в местности сидбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер 20 мая 1555 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности сидбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Clapp nació en 1500, en Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Clapp, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thomas Clapp, tenía 39 años. Se casó con Alice en 1526, en Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1555, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Sidbury, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
